SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Charlotte Soil

Guzman Green Land & Tree was founded over a decade ago, right here in Charlotte. We saw a need for dependable hardscaping that could withstand our unique climate – the red clay, the summer heat, and the occasional ice storm. We're not just contractors; we're your neighbors.

Our approach is simple: quality materials, skilled labor, and unwavering commitment to your vision. We understand the nuances of Charlotte's landscape, from the older ranch homes in Dilworth to the modern developments in Ballantyne. We build it right the first time, so you can enjoy it for years to come.

We believe in giving back to the community that has supported us. We actively participate in local initiatives and prioritize sourcing materials from local suppliers whenever possible. Guzman Green Land & Tree is invested in the long-term prosperity of Charlotte.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Guzman Green Land & Tree LLC

Local Expertise

We understand Charlotte's climate, soil, and building codes. We're not just contractors, we're your neighbors.

Unwavering Quality

From pavers to retaining walls, we use only the best materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

Dedicated Team

Our skilled team brings years of experience to every project, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and superior craftsmanship.

Clear Communication

We keep you informed every step of the way, from initial consultation to project completion. No surprises, just exceptional service.

Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?

Contact Guzman Green Land & Tree today for a free consultation. Let's bring your hardscaping vision to life.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Guzman Green Land & Tree did an amazing job on our paver patio! The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product exceeded our expectations. They transformed our backyard into a beautiful and functional space. We highly recommend them!

Sarah M. Paver Patio Installation
“

We hired Guzman Green Land & Tree to build a retaining wall to prevent erosion in our backyard. They did a great job, but the project took a little longer than expected. Overall, we are happy with the results and would use them again.

David K. Retaining Wall Construction
“

We love our new outdoor fireplace! Guzman Green Land & Tree did a fantastic job designing and building it. It's the perfect addition to our backyard and we've already enjoyed many evenings around the fire.

Emily S. Outdoor Fireplace Installation
“

Guzman Green Land & Tree solved our drainage problems! Our backyard used to be a swamp after it rained, but now it's dry and usable. They were professional and efficient, and we highly recommend them.

John L. Drainage Solutions
“

We had Guzman Green Land & Tree replace our old, cracked driveway. They did a good job, but there were a few minor imperfections in the finish. Overall, we are satisfied with the work and the price was reasonable.

Jessica R. Concrete Driveway Replacement
“

Guzman Green Land & Tree built a beautiful pergola for our patio. They helped us design the perfect structure and the craftsmanship is excellent. We couldn't be happier!

Michael B. Pergola Construction

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of pavers are best for Charlotte's climate?
Concrete pavers are a popular choice due to their durability and resistance to freeze-thaw cycles. Natural stone pavers offer a timeless aesthetic but may require more maintenance.
How long does paver installation typically take?
The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project. A small patio may take a few days, while a large driveway could take a week or more. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.
Do you offer a warranty on your paver installations?
Yes, we offer a warranty on our workmanship and materials. We stand behind the quality of our work and are committed to your satisfaction.
